3176320.name: Happy Corp.
3176320.description:
"Happy Corp. has a mission to bring HAPPINESS to worlds throughout the Universe. We are confident that YOU are a catalyst in that glorious endeavor."

Happy Corp is a capitalist dystopian arcade block breaker. Happy Corp. is a mysterious corporation operating throughout multiple universes. You work in the rehabilitation department, destroying cities and cultures that have fallen behind on payments.

The game is currently in development but will feature:
- Mechs
- Monsters
- 100 levels and 10 bosses
- Variety of biomes
- Capitalist Dystopia
3176320.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
